vulnerability.title: Uninstall tftp-server Package
vulnerability.description: The tftp-server package can be removed with the following command: $ sudo dnf remove tftp-server
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # CAUTION: This remediation script will remove tftp-server # from the system, and may remove any packages # that depend on tftp-server. Execute this # remediation AFTER testing on a non-production # system! if rpm -q --quiet "tftp-server" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "tftp-server" fi

triage_decision.reason: Removing the tftp-server package aligns with STIG hardening practices to eliminate unnecessary network services. It is not critical for core system operation or administrative access, and the remediation follows the policy for safe package removal. The caution about dependent packages is noted, but in typical deployments, tftp-server has few dependencies and poses minimal risk when removed after validation.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential removal of packages dependent on tftp-server
